message:
test(inode,journal,extent): add proptest property-based tests + fix descriptor tag parsing and btrfs write guard

Proptest additions across three crates:
- ffs-extent: map coverage, multi-alloc no-overlap, punch-hole preservation,
  unwritten flag, mark_written physical stability, split correctness, block
  conservation (8 new property tests)
- ffs-inode: timestamp epoch/nsec encoding, touch_atime isolation,
  touch_mtime_ctime symmetry, serialize/parse roundtrip, locate_inode
  out-of-range (6 new property tests)
- ffs-journal: JBD2 write/replay roundtrip, revoke skips, blocks_needed
  prediction, region/segment resolve, descriptor/revoke parse fuzz, native
  COW roundtrip, apply_replay correctness (9 new property tests)

Bug fixes discovered via proptest:
- ffs-journal: remove erroneous zero-sentinel break in parse_descriptor_tags
  that skipped valid tags targeting block 0 with flags=0
- ffs-core: reject btrfs images with zero-sized synthetic block group in
  enable_writes (total_bytes <= data_start)

FUSE E2E hardening:
- Call enable_writes() for both ext4 and btrfs mount helpers
- Fix hello.txt size assertion (25 -> 26 bytes)
- Bump btrfs test image to 128 MiB (minimum ~109 MiB)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
